input.organisation_context: Catalogue RAG purchase flow. No category filter selected. No vendor filter selected.
success_factors: Select the strongest vendor for software system.
Use catalogue evidence and buyer priorities to define scoring criteria.

criteria.label: RAG Accuracy
criteria.description: Precision and relevance of retrieved information in the catalogue search results.

criteria.label: System Integration
criteria.description: Ease of connecting with existing catalogue data sources and APIs.

criteria.label: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Recurring annual or monthly licensing fees.

criteria.label: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Estimated professional services and internal resource hours required for deployment.

criteria.label: Security & Compliance
criteria.description: Adherence to data protection standards and enterprise security protocols.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Financial health and long-term viability of the software provider.

criteria.label: Strategic Fit
criteria.description: Alignment with long-term digital transformation and catalogue management goals.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Ability to host and process data within required geographic boundaries.
